meaning: adj.动人的,令人同情的 prep.<书>关于,至于
examples: He felt a hand touching his shoulder.
His devotion to his wife and family is touching.
The humility is touching, but Jeter has been aiming for Yankee greatness for most of his life.
The Flynns broke ground on the casino in October 1999, touching off a flurry of litigation and inquiry.
